mapper.select: SELECT EMOJI_NO , EMOJI_NAME FROM EMOJI_TBL ORDER BY EMOJI_NO
SELECT TOUR_WISHLIST_NO , TOUR_WISHLIST_NAME , EMOJI_NO FROM TOUR_WISHLIST_TBL WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY TOUR_WISHLIST_NO DESC

SELECT T.TOUR_ITEM_NO , T.TOUR_ITEM_NAME , T.TOUR_ITEM_ADULT_PRICE , T.TOUR_ITEM_KID_PRICE , T.START_PERIOD , T.END_PERIOD , T.TOUR_ITEM_DAYS , T.TOUR_ITEM_STATUS , (SELECT I.TOUR_ITEM_IMG_PATH FROM TOUR_ITEM_IMG_TBL I WHERE I.TOUR_ITEM_NO = T.TOUR_ITEM_NO AND I.TOUR_ITEM_IMG_ORDER = 1) AS TOUR_ITEM_IMG_PATH
, COUNT(W.TOUR_ITEM_NO) AS WISH_COUNT
FROM TOUR_ITEM_TBL T
LEFT JOIN TOUR_WISH_TBL W ON T.TOUR_ITEM_NO = W.TOUR_ITEM_NO GROUP BY T.TOUR_ITEM_NO , T.TOUR_ITEM_NAME , T.TOUR_ITEM_ADULT_PRICE , T.TOUR_ITEM_KID_PRICE , T.START_PERIOD , T.END_PERIOD , T.TOUR_ITEM_DAYS , T.TOUR_ITEM_STATUS ORDER BY WISH_COUNT DESC
ORDER BY START_PERIOD, TOUR_ITEM_NO
